vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The visual data indicates a total loss of biological visibility. The registry (P1-P4) cannot be verified as the current environment is in a state of complete darkness (blackout).
vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: Systemic Loss: All specimens (P1-P4) are currently unobservable. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is also obscured.
vision_report.biome_observations: The environment has transitioned from a visible, illuminated state (Images Earliest through T-2) to a state of total light deprivation (Images T-1 and Current). No soil, foliage, or structural features are discernible.
vision_report.temporal_deltas: From T-2 to T-1, the lighting system failed or was deactivated, resulting in a complete loss of visual data. No recovery of visibility has occurred in the current frame.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: Inconclusive due to lack of light. Previous frames (Earliest to T-2) showed soil with debris/interventions, but no active, healthy plant growth was clearly identifiable even under illumination.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the total absence of light in the current and preceding frame, rendering the botanical audit impossible.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit began with a visible, albeit poorly lit, desk environment containing pots with soil and debris. Over the course of the sequence, the light source was lost. As of the current timestamp, the biome is in total darkness. I have performed the audit by comparing the visible history to the current void; the plants are effectively 'lost' to observation.
